overview: NewsRec AI is a standalone, client-side personalized news recommendation app built with React + Vite. It features a hybrid TF-IDF + collaborative filtering recommendation engine, multi-user demo switcher, Google News-style card layout, search, article upload, user profiles, and a metrics dashboard — all running in the browser with mock data, no backend required.
features: Personalized homepage with 3 feed sections: Recommended for You, Trending Now, Based on Your Interests
Hybrid recommendation engine: TF-IDF cosine similarity + collaborative filtering, all in-browser
Multi-user demo switcher (user1–user5) with distinct profiles, regions, and interests
Article interaction tracking — likes and reads update recommendations in real-time
Search by keyword and category, with results influencing future recommendations
News upload with keyword-based NLP validation
User profile page with region, interests, and reading history
Metrics dashboard with category charts, interaction trends, and regional distribution
Dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile
